Explore Projects Read Notes
  • Python
  • LangGraph
  • FastAPI
  • React
  • Postgres
  • Astro
async function shipUsefulSoftware() {
  const focus = ["projects", "docs", "notes"];
  const approach = "build-first";
  const systems = await orchestrate({
    backend: "FastAPI",
    ai: "LangGraph",
    storage: "Postgres"
  });

  return { focus, approach, systems };
}

Current Direction

Readable project documentation that can keep growing.

The portfolio is being rebuilt around a cleaner content system so new projects, architecture notes, and deeper implementation pages are easier to add later.

Open Habit Tracker

Local-first habit tracking with structured product data, AI-assisted summaries, and a path toward vision-based events.

 Open Engineering Notes

Working notes on MVP scoping, orchestration choices, and how current projects are being shaped over time.

Later Upgrade Path

Homepage motion can become a proper scroll story later.

This landing page is intentionally structured so a pinned GSAP sequence can be added later without redoing the docs or content architecture.
